title: limodorum funale
intro: Limodorum funale, also known as the funnel orchid, is a rare and unique orchid species native to Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The funnel orchid is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the funnel orchid is often used in infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity and limited scientific research.
